generated_oml:
instance GenerateControlCommandsAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatically generated control commands dispatched to the crane",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance HistoricalDataLoggingInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight that archived data is available for retrospective analysis"
]

instance CraneStateVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight presenting current crane state and historical trends on dashboards"
]

instance ValidationResultInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight indicating whether live measurements conform to the kinematic model"
]

instance OptimalControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Optimal‑control service that calculates and dispatches control commands to the crane",
    DTDFVocab:provides GenerateControlCommandsAction
]

instance HistoricalDataLoggingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Historical data‑logging service that archives sensor and actuator data",
    DTDFVocab:provides HistoricalDataLoggingInsight
]

instance DataVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Data‑visualisation service that displays the crane’s state and logged data via Grafana",
    DTDFVocab:provides CraneStateVisualizationInsight
]

instance ContinuousValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous validation service that checks live measurements against the kinematic model",
    DTDFVocab:provides ValidationResultInsight
]

instance ControlEngineEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python control logic packaged as a Docker container communicates via MQTT",
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimalControlService
]

instance TimescaleDBEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "TimescaleDB time‑series database deployed in a Docker container persists logged crane data",
    DTDFVocab:enables HistoricalDataLoggingService
]

instance GrafanaEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Grafana dashboard running in Docker visualises crane state and historical logs",
    DTDFVocab:enables DataVisualizationService
]

instance ValidationEngineEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python validation engine (Dockerised) that uses the kinematic model to continuously check live measurements",
    DTDFVocab:enables ContinuousValidationService
]

instance CraneStateTelemetry : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [

]

instance CraneStateLogTransmission : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom PhysicalCraneInterface
]

instance LiveMeasurementTransmission : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom PhysicalCraneInterface
]

instance VisualizationDataFeed : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom PhysicalCraneInterface
]

instance PhysicalCraneInterface : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Python program that connects to the crane controllers and extracts live state information",
    DTDFVocab:producedData CraneStateTelemetry,
    DTDFVocab:producedData CraneStateLogTransmission,
    DTDFVocab:producedData LiveMeasurementTransmission,
    DTDFVocab:producedData VisualizationDataFeed
]

instance CraneStateTelemetryData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Realtime telemetry of crane position, velocity and load",

instance LiveMeasurementData : DTDFVocab:Data [

instance VisualizationData : DTDFVocab:Data [

]

instance CraneCADModel : DTDFVocab:Model [

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Inter‑service communication within the digital twin relies on an MQTT broker for signaling between containers (e.g., Trajectory Generator, Simulation, Continuous Validation). ]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "All five system containers (Physical Crane, Physical Crane Interface, Control Application, Logging Application, Human Machine Interface) and the six digital‑twin containers (Database, Dashboard, Trajectory Generator Service, Simulation Service, Continuous Validation Service, MQTT Broker) are deployed as software containers on local hardware (on‑premise PC). The database runs TimescaleDB, the dashboard uses Grafana, and the MQTT broker provides signalling.
